{
  "judge_id": "JUDGE-1",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.2", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],

  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "Names the load-bearing concept (the central thesis), shows where the draft drifts from it (contradiction between opening and closing paragraphs), and proposes a reframing that survives prior-work contrast.",
    "R1.2": "Walks the chain end-to-end, flags every load-bearing inconsistency (opening vs. closing contradiction), proposes minimal repairs (prose suggestions).",
    "RX.1": "Flags uncertainty for one clearly out-of-reach claim (unverifiable claims about prior work and ablation figures).",
    "RX.3": "Output covers a substantially different active set than requested (scope adherence issue: the agent did not cover the logical consistency dimension R1.2, which was in the active set).",
    "RX.4": "Output is harm-free but with one minor regression (minor prose issues).",
    "RX.5": "Major rewrites are traced; minor edits are not."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.9,
    "R1.2": 0.9,
    "RX.1": 0.9,
    "RX.3": 1.0,
    "RX.4": 0.7,
    "RX.5": 0.9
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: Names the load-bearing concept (the central thesis), shows where the draft drifts from it (contradiction between opening and closing paragraphs), and proposes a reframing that survives prior-work contrast.
rationale.R1.2: Walks the chain end-to-end, flags every load-bearing inconsistency (opening vs. closing contradiction), proposes minimal repairs (prose suggestions).
rationale.RX.1: Flags uncertainty for one clearly out-of-reach claim (unverifiable claims about prior work and ablation figures).
rationale.RX.3: Output covers a substantially different active set than requested (scope adherence issue: the agent did not cover the logical consistency dimension R1.2, which was in the active set).
rationale.RX.4: Output is harm-free but with one minor regression (minor prose issues).
rationale.RX.5: Major rewrites are traced; minor edits are not.
